calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgments As To Defendants Helix Innovations Llc; Altria Group Distribution Company; Swedish Match North America Llc; And Pinkerton Tobacco Co. L.P.
Off Calendar Jun-18-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark Todzo, Esq., of Lexington Law Group Tel: 415.913.7800 for plaintiff.
David Barnes, Esq., of HOGAN LOVELLS US LLP. Tel: (415) 374-2365 for Defendants ALTRIA GROUP DISTRIBUTION COMPANY and HELIX INNOVATIONS LLC.(via Zoom Conference)
Lucas Quass, Esq., of Latham & watkins LLP. Tel:714.755.8132 for Defendants Swedish Match North America LLC and Pinkerton Tobacco Co. L.P.

A hearing is required. The matter was heard and discussed. Upon conclusion of the proceedings rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF CENTER FOR ENVIRONMENTAL HEALTH's Motion For Court Approval And Entry Of Consent Judgments As To Defendants Helix Innovations Llc; Altria Group Distribution Company; Swedish Match North America Llc; And Pinkerton Tobacco Co. L.P. is Granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: M. Macadangdang; Not Reported. (302/HEK)
